hc4b79b4bg74a8g40c0gb8aag2b5a5755d02e: This must be awful, Wyll. All these wicked little creatures you can't slay.
h1948f715g51fcg4aefgaefdg7de8b44adc2c: I reckoned I should leave some for you, should you get peckish.
h06fc7cecg6803g46dfgbb25ge16cfbb10f97: Like an itch I can't scratch. But first we do our business. Then comes the pleasure.
